# pixie-renderer-source-build

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Target | pixie |
| Type | source-build |
| Status | planned |

## Public Notes

Planned reproduction recipe for rebuilding the public Pixie renderer source mirror and recording renderer-output constraints.

## Environment

- clean checkout of the public Pixie source mirror at the recorded pixie-master-head commit
- host compiler and renderer dependencies selected from public project metadata and repository files
- public/open RenderMan-compatible validation inputs or procedural scenes
- no private production scene assets committed to this repository
- local build and render transcript captured as derived metadata

## Steps

- clone or update the public Pixie source mirror listed in the artifact record
- verify the local checkout commit against the pixie-master-head snapshot record
- use SourceForge and repository metadata to identify platform, license, and dependency assumptions
- configure and compile the renderer with only public/open dependencies
- run a minimal public-safe render or command-line smoke test when available
- record build commands, diagnostics, produced outputs, test notes, and missing dependencies as public metadata
- promote repeatable commands and renderer-output notes into the Pixie archive packet

## Expected Outputs

- source snapshot manifest
- build environment manifest
- compiler transcript
- renderer output inventory
- public-safe render smoke-test notes
- dependency gap list

## Artifacts

- pixie-renderer-source-mirror
- pixie-sourceforge-project-record
